data.body: It was unequivocally a terrible idea to adopt the practice online of not correcting spelling, punctuation, grammar, etc; that doing so was bad because *what if* the person is ESL or dyslexic etc. Kids haven't been taught reading properly for decades. We could've helped and chose not to.
